title: Lido ETH staking
summary: ETH deposited into Lido for liquid staking yield, introducing destination-protocol risk rather than intrinsic depeg-style asset risk.

title: Aave Umbrella USDC on Ethereum
summary: USDC staked through Aave Umbrella, combining the wrapped Aave reserve carry with the live Umbrella reward layer.

title: Aave sGHO Savings on Ethereum
summary: GHO routed into the sGHO savings product, using the live official Aave savings APR rather than a generic pooled fallback.

title: Aave Umbrella GHO on Ethereum
summary: GHO staked into Aave Umbrella, separating stake-level reward carry from the base GHO asset risk and Aave venue risk.

title: Aave Umbrella USDT on Ethereum
summary: USDT staked through Aave Umbrella, layering the wrapped Aave reserve yield with the live Umbrella reward schedule.

title: Sky USDS Savings on Ethereum
summary: USDS routed into Sky savings, using the live sUSDS opportunity for current carry and TVL.
